summary: Iteration 23 - Comprehensive testing after code refactoring. Reports moved to routes/reports_routes.py. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, Settings/Staff, POS, Reports) working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/reports/sales - Returns sales report with total_sales, total_orders, by_payment_method, by_delivery_app, top_products
GET /api/reports/purchases - Returns purchases report with total_purchases, by_supplier, by_payment_status
GET /api/reports/inventory - Returns inventory report with total_items, low_stock_items, inventory_value
GET /api/reports/expenses - Returns expenses report with total_expenses, by_category, by_date
GET /api/reports/profit-loss - Returns profit/loss report with revenue, cost_of_goods_sold, gross_profit, net_profit
GET /api/reports/delivery-credits - Returns delivery credits report with total_sales, total_commission, by_delivery_app
GET /api/reports/products - Returns products report with products list, top_selling, low_selling
GET /api/reports/sales (owner auth) - Works with super_admin authentication
GET /api/reports/profit-loss (owner auth) - Works with super_admin authentication

login.notes: Beautiful login page with restaurant background slideshow. Login works correctly.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard shows 17 quick action buttons, statistics section with period filters, recent orders. Quick actions filter correctly based on user permissions.

settings_staff.notes: Staff/Roles tab (الأدوار والموظفين) shows staff list with name, email, role, branch, status. Add Staff dialog includes permissions section with toggles for various pages. Branch and role filters available.

pos.notes: POS page shows 6 categories with images, products with prices, 10 tables grid, order type tabs (محلي, سفري, توصيل), cart with payment options (نقدي, بطاقة, آجل).

reports.notes: Reports page shows 10 report tabs (المبيعات, المشتريات, المصاريف, الأرباح, الأصناف, التوصيل, الإلغاءات, الخصومات, الآجل), date range filters, branch selector, statistics cards, export buttons (Excel, PDF).

critical_code_review_comments: Code refactoring successful - reports moved to routes/reports_routes.py
Shared utilities properly extracted to routes/shared.py
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_reports_routes.py - Created comprehensive test suite for refactored reports

All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, Settings/Staff, POS, Reports) working correctly. Staff permissions UI shows toggles for various pages.
